UX-A11Y-001.name: Color Contrast Ratio
UX-A11Y-001.description: Text-to-background contrast meets WCAG AA standards
UX-A11Y-001.impact: Critical for users with visual impairments
UX-A11Y-001.recommendation: Ensure text has 4.5:1 contrast ratio (3:1 for large text)

UX-A11Y-002.name: Touch Target Size
UX-A11Y-002.description: Interactive elements meet minimum size requirements
UX-A11Y-002.impact: Users with motor impairments struggle with small targets

UX-A11Y-004.name: Form Labels
UX-A11Y-004.description: All form inputs have associated labels
UX-A11Y-004.impact: Screen readers cannot identify unlabeled input purposes
UX-A11Y-004.recommendation: Add <label> elements or aria-label to all form inputs

UX-A11Y-007.name: ARIA Landmarks
UX-A11Y-007.description: Page uses semantic HTML5 or ARIA landmarks
UX-A11Y-007.impact: Screen readers can quickly navigate page sections
UX-A11Y-007.recommendation: Add semantic HTML5 elements (nav, main, footer) or ARIA roles

UX-A11Y-008.name: Skip to Content Link
UX-A11Y-008.description: Page has 'skip to main content' link
UX-A11Y-008.impact: Keyboard users must tab through entire nav on every page
UX-A11Y-008.recommendation: Add a 'skip to main content' link as the first focusable element

UX-A11Y-012.name: Language Declaration
UX-A11Y-012.description: HTML tag has a lang attribute
UX-A11Y-012.impact: Screen readers cannot determine correct pronunciation
UX-A11Y-012.recommendation: Add lang attribute to <html> tag (e.g., <html lang='en'>)

UX-MOB-001.name: Viewport Meta Tag
UX-MOB-001.description: Page has proper viewport meta tag for mobile responsiveness
UX-MOB-001.impact: Page will not be mobile-responsive without viewport tag

UX-MOB-002.name: Mobile-Friendly Layout
UX-MOB-002.description: Content fits within mobile viewport without horizontal scrolling
UX-MOB-002.impact: Users must scroll horizontally to read content

UX-MOB-003.name: Text Readability
UX-MOB-003.description: Base font size is large enough for mobile reading
UX-MOB-003.impact: Small text is difficult to read on mobile
UX-MOB-003.recommendation: Increase base font size to at least 16px

UX-MOB-010.name: Mobile CTA Visibility
UX-MOB-010.description: Primary Call-to-Action is visible above the fold on mobile
UX-MOB-010.impact: Users don't see primary action immediately
UX-MOB-010.recommendation: Place primary CTA above the fold on mobile

UX-VIS-001.name: Visual Hierarchy
UX-VIS-001.description: Clear visual hierarchy guides user attention
UX-VIS-001.impact: Users cannot quickly scan and understand content
UX-VIS-001.recommendation: Use size, color, and spacing to create clear hierarchy

UX-VIS-002.name: Whitespace Usage
UX-VIS-002.description: Layout uses adequate whitespace to prevent clutter
UX-VIS-002.impact: Cramped design is hard to read and scan

UX-VIS-003.name: Typography Consistency
UX-VIS-003.description: Limited font families and consistent styles
UX-VIS-003.impact: Too many fonts create visual chaos

UX-VIS-004.name: Color Palette
UX-VIS-004.description: Consistent color palette supports brand identity
UX-VIS-004.impact: Inconsistent colors confuse users and dilute brand
UX-VIS-004.recommendation: Use a consistent palette of 3-5 primary colors

UX-VIS-009.name: Grid Alignment
UX-VIS-009.description: Elements align to a logical grid system
UX-VIS-009.recommendation: Align elements using a grid system

UX-VIS-010.name: Visual Balance
UX-VIS-010.impact: Unbalanced layouts feel awkward and unfinished
UX-VIS-010.recommendation: Distribute visual weight evenly across the page

UX-EXP-001.name: Above-the-Fold Content
UX-EXP-001.description: Key content is visible without scrolling
UX-EXP-001.impact: Users might leave if they don't see value immediately
UX-EXP-001.recommendation: Place value proposition and CTA above the fold

UX-EXP-002.name: Value Proposition
UX-EXP-002.description: Homepage clearly states what the site offers
UX-EXP-002.impact: Users don't understand what you offer
UX-EXP-002.recommendation: Add a clear headline explaining your value proposition

UX-EXP-003.name: CTA Prominence
UX-EXP-003.impact: Users don't know what action to take

UX-EXP-004.name: Navigation Clarity
UX-EXP-004.description: Navigation labels are clear and descriptive
UX-EXP-004.impact: Users cannot find what they're looking for
UX-EXP-004.recommendation: Use simple, descriptive labels for navigation

UX-EXP-007.name: Trust Indicators
UX-EXP-007.description: Site displays trust elements (testimonials, logos, etc.)
UX-EXP-007.impact: Users may not trust the site without social proof
UX-EXP-007.recommendation: Add testimonials, partner logos, or trust seals
